title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 434.020 - Assignment not to affect defense
text:
434.020.  Assignment not to affect defense. — The assignment of any bond, bill, note, judgment, conveyance or other security shall not affect the defense of the person executing or confessing the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 3395) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3008; 1919 § 5745; 1909 § 6626
